title: Susana
writer: Manuel Reachi, Jaime Salvador, Rodolfo Usigli
actors: Rosita Quintana, Fernando Soler, Víctor Manuel Mendoza
plot: An unstable young woman escapes from a reformatory for seriously wayward girls and deceptively finds shelter in the kind home of a frighteningly nice and decent family. Little by little, she causes unrest and discord among the mem...
